title: AI security fundamentals
summary: Learn the fundamental concepts of AI security.

sections.title: AI security fundamentals
sections.summary: Learn the fundamental concepts of AI security.

lessons.title: Fundamentals of AI security
lessons.content_md:
Learn about AI security fundamentals including how AI security differs from traditional cybersecurity, the three-layer AI architecture model, and AI-specific attack techniques like jailbreaking, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/fundamentals-ai-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: AI security controls
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the security controls you can implement to protect AI systems, including content filters, metaprompts, data security, grounding, and monitoring.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/ai-security-controls/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to AI security testing
lessons.content_md:
Learn about AI red teaming, the three categories of AI security testing, and how to plan and execute red teaming exercises for LLMs and AI-enabled applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-ai-security-testing/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AI security fundamentals
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AI security fundamentals**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
